subject: Icibemba
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Litilica Yakulandafye
topics: Iciunda – icongo ico icifuma mukulanda, mukulisha ing’oma nangu
Ifisolobelo – ifintu ifyo babomfya pakubomba umulimo umo
activities: Ukusambilila ukupitila mukufwaya nokusanga ifishinka pamilandu
Ukubomfya kompyuta mukupanga amalyashi, utusela nama
